fields.label: Room Number
fields.description: The specific hotel room allocated for this row. Room availability for the parent reservation's from_date to to_date is validated by the centralized room availability utility (room_availability.py) when the parent is saved.

fields.label: Room Type
fields.description: Auto-fetched from the selected Room Number. Used for tariff lookups and reporting.

fields.label: Rate Type
fields.description: Rate category applied (e.g. Standard, Weekend, Corporate). Populated from the Hotel Room Tariff lookup when the room is selected.

fields.label: Season Type
fields.description: Active season at the time of the check-in date (e.g. Peak, Off-Peak, Shoulder). Populated from Hotel Season records.

fields.label: Rate per Night
fields.description: Nightly tariff for this room, resolved from the Hotel Room Tariff table for the given room_type, rate_type, and check-in date.

fields.label: Nights
fields.description: Copied from the parent Hotel Reservation (to_date - from_date). Used to compute room_total.

fields.label: Room-Level Discount
fields.description: Optional per-room discount amount (fixed currency value). Applied before the reservation-level discount. Useful for negotiated corporate room rates.

fields.label: Room Total
fields.description: Computed as: (rate_per_night × number_of_nights) - discount. This value feeds into the parent reservation's subtotal.

fields.label: Occupant Details
fields.description: Details of the guest physically occupying this room. For multi-room reservations, each room can have a different occupant. If left blank, the parent reservation's primary guest is assumed to be the occupant.

fields.label: Occupant Name
fields.description: Full name of the person staying in this specific room.

fields.options:
Passport
National ID
Driver's License
Other
fields.label: ID Type
fields.description: Type of government-issued identification presented by this occupant.

fields.label: ID Number
fields.description: Document number from the occupant's ID for compliance and audit purposes.

fields.label: Phone
fields.description: Direct contact number for the occupant in this room.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: Email address for the occupant in this room.

fields.label: Operational References
fields.description: System-generated links created when the guest checks in or checks out. These are read-only and are used by front-desk and housekeeping workflows to navigate directly to the relevant operational documents.

fields.label: Check-In Reference
fields.description: Link to the Hotel Room Check In document created when this specific room is checked in. Populated automatically by the check-in workflow.

fields.label: Check-Out Reference
fields.description: Link to the Hotel Room Check Out document created when this specific room is checked out. Populated automatically by the checkout workflow.
